Peyto Exploration & Development Corp. and Centrica Energy Enter 10-Year Natural Gas Supply Agreement
Peyto Exploration & Development Corp. Announces Voting Results From Annual General Meeting of Shareholders
Peyto Exploration & Development Corp. Confirms Monthly Dividend for June 15, 2026
Peyto Reports Record First Quarter 2026 Results and 9% Dividend Increase

holdings.infoBox: PEY is an equity ETF with a total of 53 individual holdings. The top holdings are Insperity stock at 5.95%, Robert Half at 4.83%, LyondellBasell Industries at 3.89%, HP Inc. at 2.97%, and Flowers Foods at 2.88%.

overview.description: The Invesco High Yield Equity Dividend Achievers ETF (PEY) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the NASDAQ US Dividend Achievers 50 TR index. The fund tracks a yield-weighted index of US companies that have increased their annual dividends for at least 10 consecutive years. PEY was launched on Dec 9, 2004 and is issued by Invesco.
infoTable: NASDAQ US Dividend Achievers 50 Index TR
